title: cyphia volubilis var. intermedia
intro: Cyphia volubilis var. intermedia, also known as the intermediate or intermediate blue cyphium, is a type of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Africa, where its roots and leaves are valued for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of Cyphia volubilis var. intermedia can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
